stories.headline: OpenAI robotics hardware leader resigns over Pentagon AI partnership concerns.
bullets: Caitlin Kalinowski quit March 7 citing inadequate guardrails for Pentagon deal — per TechCrunch
Kalinowski criticized OpenAI's haste in military partnership without proper oversight — NPR
OpenAI told Engadget no plans to replace departing robotics hardware executive

stories.headline: Anthropic discovers 22 Firefox vulnerabilities using Claude Opus 4.6 AI model.
bullets: AI found 14 high-severity, 7 moderate, 1 low-severity bugs over two weeks — The Hacker News
Mozilla fixed all vulnerabilities in Firefox 148 released late February — The Hacker News
Security partnership demonstrates AI's capability in automated vulnerability discovery

stories.headline: OpenAI delays ChatGPT 'adult mode' launch indefinitely to focus on core features.
bullets: Adult content feature postponed again after December delay — per Sources' Alex Heath
Company prioritizing intelligence gains, personality improvements over adult mode — Engadget
Feature would give verified adults access to erotica and explicit content — TechCrunch

stories.headline: Iran names Ayatollah Khamenei's son Mojtaba as new supreme leader after father's death.
bullets: Assembly of Experts chose Mojtaba Khamenei, 56, as third supreme leader — Iranian state TV
First hereditary succession since 1979 revolution overthrew Pahlavi monarchy — Fortune
Selection seen as act of defiance during US-Israeli war — Financial Times

stories.headline: US weighs sending special forces to secure Iran's nuclear stockpile during war.
bullets: US-Israel discussed special forces mission to seize 450kg of 60%-enriched uranium — Axios
Material convertible to weapons grade within weeks — four sources confirmed to Axios
Operation would target preventing Iran from ever obtaining nuclear weapon — Axios

stories.headline: Explosion investigated as potential terrorism at US Embassy in Oslo.
bullets: Blast caused minor damage to embassy building early March 8 — BBC News
Norwegian police investigating terrorism motive after initial explosion — DW News
No injuries reported in Sunday morning incident — NPR

stories.headline: Oil surges past $100 for first time since 2022 as Iran war escalates.
bullets: Brent crude hit $114.30, up 23.38% while WTI rose 26.35% to $114.85 — CNBC March 9
Prices crossed $100 Sunday for first time in nearly four years — multiple sources
Strait of Hormuz closure and production cuts driving supply concerns — Bloomberg

stories.headline: Dow futures plunge over 1,000 points as Middle East conflict roils global markets.
bullets: US stock futures fell Sunday with oil surge above $100 barrel — MarketWatch
Emerging market stocks down 10% from recent peak amid risk-off sentiment — Bloomberg
South Korean equities and Indonesian markets slumped on war risks — Bloomberg

stories.headline: China inflation jumps to three-year high as oil rally adds pressure.
bullets: Consumer prices accelerated to fastest growth in over three years — Bloomberg March 9
Factory deflation moderated again amid energy market rally — CNBC
Lunar New Year holiday spending boom contributed to price increases — Bloomberg

stories.headline: Google awards CEO Sundar Pichai $692 million pay package tied to performance metrics.
bullets: Package mostly performance-based with stock incentives linked to Waymo, Wing — TechCrunch
New compensation structure ties pay to autonomous driving and drone delivery success
Award announced March 8 as part of executive compensation restructuring — TechCrunch

stories.headline: Indonesia announces social media ban for anyone under 16 starting March 28.
bullets: High-risk platforms must delete accounts from users under 16 — Minister Meutya Hafid
Implementation begins March 28 with YouTube, TikTok, Facebook — Engadget
Country follows Australia's approach to child social media restrictions

stories.headline: LibreOffice Writer adds native Markdown support in version 26.2 release.
bullets: Document Foundation announced Markdown compatibility February 4 — Hacker News
Feature allows direct import and export of Markdown files in Writer
Addition addresses long-standing user requests for native Markdown handling

stories.headline: Oil soars toward $120 as Iran war forces major Middle East production cuts.
bullets: Major producers curbed output with Strait of Hormuz remaining closed — Bloomberg March 8
WTI crude trading at $114.85, up from around $90 before conflict began
Gulf Arab producers cutting production due to storage space shortage — CNBC

stories.headline: Crop prices jump as Middle East conflict disrupts trade and threatens supplies.
bullets: Soybean oil surged over 4% while wheat neared two-year peak — Bloomberg March 9
Energy and fertilizer cost increases driving agricultural market concerns
Trade route disruptions threaten to tighten global food supply chains

stories.headline: Europe faces new gas crisis with storage below 30% and QatarEnergy facility shutdown.
bullets: EU gas storage levels dropped below 30% as benchmark prices hit year highs — OilPrice.com
QatarEnergy shut down world's biggest LNG production facility — OilPrice.com March 8
Gas prices gained 60% since US-Israel bombing of Iran began Saturday

stories.headline: FBI investigates breach potentially affecting wiretapping and surveillance systems.
bullets: Federal bureau probing compromise of systems related to surveillance tools — The Register
Breach may have impacted law enforcement wiretapping capabilities
Investigation ongoing with full scope of compromise still being assessed

stories.headline: OpenAI launches Codex Security agent finding 10,561 high-severity vulnerabilities.
bullets: AI security agent scanned 1.2 million commits in research preview — The Hacker News
Available to ChatGPT Pro, Enterprise, Business, Edu customers via web interface
Tool identifies, validates, and proposes fixes for code vulnerabilities

stories.headline: Microsoft reports hackers increasingly using AI across all cyberattack stages.
bullets: Threat actors using AI to accelerate attacks and scale malicious activity — Bleeping Computer
North Korea taking advantage of AI agents for managing attack workflows
AI helps outsource 'janitorial work' needed for cyberattack planning — Microsoft

stories.headline: Palmer Luckey's retro gaming startup ModRetro seeks $1 billion valuation funding.
bullets: Company launched Game Boy-style Chromatic handheld device in 2024 — TechCrunch
ModRetro reportedly pursuing new investment round at unicorn valuation
Startup focuses on retro gaming hardware with modern technology integration

stories.headline: Scientists discover balanced atom breaking nuclear physics rules in molybdenum-84.
bullets: Molybdenum-84 shows deformed structure despite equal protons and neutrons — Science Daily March 8
Discovery reveals new 'Island of Inversion' in unexpected location
Findings challenge decades-old assumptions about nuclear stability patterns

stories.headline: AI identifies liquid-like ion flow signal enabling faster solid-state battery development.
bullets: Machine learning pipeline predicts Raman spectra for ion movement detection — Science Daily
Low-frequency signal indicates rapid ion motion disrupting crystal symmetry
Approach could dramatically accelerate solid-state battery material discovery

stories.headline: NASA DART mission reveals asteroids exchange material through 'cosmic snowballs.'
bullets: Images show faint streaks on Dimorphos from debris drifting from Didymos — Science Daily
First direct visual proof sunlight spins asteroids fast enough to shed debris
Discovery shows near-Earth asteroids more active than previously believed

stories.headline: Pentagon reports seventh US service member killed in Middle East Iran war.
bullets: Army soldier died from injuries in Iranian attack on Saudi Arabia — Fortune March 8
All seven war casualties were Army soldiers, six reservists killed March 1 in Kuwait
Deaths occurred during Iranian retaliation for US-Israeli strikes on Iran

stories.headline: Pentagon and FAA to conduct anti-drone laser tests after Texas airspace closures.
bullets: Tests follow two Texas airspace closures in past month from laser deployments — Fortune
Lawmakers concerned about lack of coordination between Pentagon and FAA
CBP used anti-drone laser in February without notifying aviation authorities

stories.headline: Trump announces missile makers agree to quadruple production capacity.
bullets: Defense companies committed to major production increases — Defense One March 7
Announcement follows months of White House pressure for faster weapons manufacturing
Move aimed at addressing munitions shortages amid Iran conflict escalation

stories.headline: Emirates resumes Dubai flights after Middle East air travel disruption strands Britons.
bullets: New UK flights follow days of widespread regional aviation disruption — BBC March 7
Service resumption helps British travelers previously stranded in Middle East
Flights restored as some Gulf airspace reopens amid ongoing Iran conflict

stories.headline: Gulf businesses purchase political violence insurance as regional conflict spreads.
bullets: Data centers, energy projects, hotels move to limit potential losses — Financial Times
Insurance purchases surge as Iran war threatens regional business operations
Companies seeking coverage for conflict-related property and operational risks

stories.headline: Federal judge voids Kari Lake's year-long tenure leading Voice of America operations.
bullets: Judge declared all Lake's actions null and void including 1,000+ layoffs — NPR March 8
Court ruled Lake's appointment to US Agency for Global Media was unlawful
Decision invalidates spending cuts and broadcaster policy changes under Lake

stories.headline: Tehran residents warned of acid rain after oil storage facility attacks.
bullets: Iran's Red Crescent Society tells locals avoid exposure as capital engulfed in smoke — FT
Toxic rain falling over city from burning oil depot fires — France24 March 8
Authorities urge residents stay indoors and avoid breathing polluted air

stories.headline: Monthly HIV injection treatments show potent alternative to daily tablets.
bullets: Long-lasting treatment suppresses HIV in patients with mental illness — Nature March 8
Injectable therapy addresses adherence challenges with standard daily treatments
Clinical results demonstrate effectiveness for difficult-to-treat patient populations

stories.headline: FDA official Vinay Prasad's controversial tenure ends after attracting sustained criticism.
bullets: Prasad's ability to attract criticism led to departure despite presidential support — STAT
Tenure marked by conflicts over medical evidence standards and drug approvals
Five key lessons identified from turbulent FDA leadership experience
